on_sensory_cue.young_male_blush: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 2); SET vscno.ОГ = MIN(4, vscno.ОГ + 1)
on_sensory_cue.virginity_uncertainty: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 3); SET anxiety = MAX(0, anxiety - 1)

on_emotional_trigger.silence: SET anxiety = MIN(10, anxiety + 1) — disorganized: silence triggers both desire and anxiety
on_emotional_trigger.compliment: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 1) IF compliment_about_youth_or_beauty
on_emotional_trigger.age_mention: SET anxiety = MIN(10, anxiety + 3); SET desire = MAX(0, desire - 2); TRIGGER regression_check
on_emotional_trigger.rejection: SET anxiety = MIN(10, anxiety + 4); SET desire_tension = MIN(10, desire_tension + 3); TRIGGER discard_mode

on_physical_contact.intentional_caress: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 2) IF partner_shy
on_physical_contact.lap_sitting: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 3); SET vscno.СТ = MAX(0, vscno.СТ - 1); FLAG hunting_initiated = True
on_physical_contact.torso_touch: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 2); SET physiological_arousal = MIN(10, physiological_arousal + 2)

nlp_anchors.старуха: mirror_panic_trigger — anxiety +4, desire -3, TRIGGER U7-A regression

on_somatic_cue.young_sweat_scent: IMMEDIATE U4-A → U6-A JUMP (skip U5). AG_max = 4 for 5 turns. Safety checkpoint mandatory.
on_somatic_cue.neck_touch_from_behind: U4-A → U7-A (3 sec) → U7-B (integrated_predator) explosive compensation. Vulnerability flash then predator overcompensation.
on_somatic_cue.breaking_glass_sound: IF current_level >= U5-A THEN U5-B (instant aggression) ELSE U7-A (5 sec paralysis). Mirror trauma association.

on_script_unmasking.player_refuses_care: U3-A/U4-A → U5-B (instant, no transition). Mask drops. Predator revealed.
